title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 197.270 - Promulgation of rules, procedure
text:
197.270.  Promulgation of rules, procedure. — The department shall promulgate rules as provided in section 197.080 and chapter 536 to effectuate the provisions of sections 197.250 to 197.280.
(L. 1992 H.B. 899 § 11, A.L. 1993 S.B. 52)
